name: Ping Identity
description: Identity and access management platform. Monitor user access and authentication.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to PingOne admin console
2. Go to Applications → add a Worker application
3. Enable it and copy the Access Token
4. Go to Settings → Environment → Properties for your Environment ID
5. Paste both values below

credentialFields.label: Environment ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in PingOne admin → Settings → Environment → Properties.

credentialFields.label: API Key (Worker App Token)
credentialFields.helpText: From a PingOne Worker application client credentials.
